cards.back: A method of estimation that involves setting a low, mid-range, and high estimate for a task
A type of three-point estimate that uses an optimistic, a basic estimate, and a pessimistic estimate for a task
A type of estimation model that uses historical data and statistical models to estimate project duration and cost
A type of estimation model that uses a triangle to display the optimistic, mid-range, and pessimistic estimates for a task
A type of estimation that involves estimating tasks in a flexible and iterative manner, often using techniques such as story points and velocity
